description: Bigdata.com provides financial intelligence and research tools, including search across financial documents, company and market data, and AI-assisted research workflows. Its platform is aimed at powering analyst workflows, applications, and agentic clients with premium financial content and structured data.
summary: Bigdata.com exposes a REST API at https://api.bigdata.com/v1, a remote MCP server at https://mcp.bigdata.com/ (streamable HTTP), and a Python-distributed CLI (`bigdata`/`bd`), primarily authenticated with Bigdata-issued API keys; the official hosted MCP connector flow can also use Bigdata App login/SSO.
